This endorsement agreement related to endorsements of Boxbollen products via social media content. Following signature of the report, I returned $50,000 as I was not able to fully perform obligations under the contract.

"America's Path Back to Moral Leadership" Skyhorse Publishing - advance owed
Agreement is for $10,000.00 dollars which has not been received.
Leave of Absence Agreement, effective 4/1/23.  Leave was unpaid and without any benefits, or other compensation.  Filer resigned effective December 2024. (2023-03-01)

J W Howard Attorneys employed me from January 1, 2023 until December 2023. In December 2024, JW Howard Attorneys made a final payment of employee compensation to me. Since December 2023, J W Howard Attorneys has not employed me or compensated me for my services, but I have continued to serve as Of Counsel, on an uncompensated, at will basis. (2023-01-01)

Pursuant to my partnership agreement, I received my final partnership payout in May 2024. I will not receive any further payment from this entity. The firm has agreed to cease to transact business utilizing the legal name, Kennedy & Madonna, LLP (2000-12-01)
If confirmed, I will transfer to Kennedy & Madonna all cases in which I have a contingency fee interest, for no compensation. I will forfeit any interest in all contingency fee cases. (2023-05-01)
Agreement has ended; there are no future speaking engagements planned and no payments due. (1993-05-01)
I do not currently have any outstanding contingent fee cases and have received all outstanding payments owed me for representation in all previous matters. (2023-03-01)
Consulting agreement regarding seeking and advising on books to be published. Upon confirmation, I will terminate this agreement. (2022-08-01)

Upon confirmation, I will retain an interest in contingency fee cases that do not involve claims against the United States and in which the United States is not a party and does not have a direct and substantial interest. I will divest of my interest in contingency fee cases that involve claims against the United States or in which the United States is a party or has a direct and substantial interest. (2016-09-01)
I will continue to receive distributions from a defined benefit plan sponsored by this employer. (2015-01-01)

Agreement for three new books. Two have been completed prior to entering government service and one has not been completed.  I will not engage in writing, editing, marketing or promotional services for any of these books during government service. (2024-08-01)
Amount owed for services rendered between Q2 2011 and Q1 2017 (2011-04-01)
Services as Chairman of the Board & Chief Legal Counsel, general advisory duties only.
Of Counsel agreement, general advisory duties

Confidential clients not disclosed pursuant to NY and California Bar Rule 1.6 = 53 individual minors.

Each client whose information is withheld is a client of WisnerBaum. As described in Part 3, pursuant to my referral agreement with WisnerBaum, I received over the reporting amount from contingency fee cases involving these clients. I will divest of all outstanding contingency fee claims arising under my agreement with WisnerBaum as described in Part 3. Fifty of the cases concern claims for damages resulting from the Woolsey fire and three of the cases concern claims for Roundup-induced non-Hodgkins lymphoma.
